title: don't soft-fail AMIP

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Decrease hierarchy experiment lengths to decrease CI time and resource usage. 

All of the hierarchy drivers currently use `dt_cpl = 400`, except cloudy slabplanet uses `100`. This PR updates each of the runs to use `t_end = 6hours`, so we can still make the plots.

This change decreases the longest hierarchy run (cloudy slabplanet) to 15 minutes of walltime (previously 30 minutes).

closes #1084
title: decrease hierarchy exp lengths
